task: Please find graduate-level computer science courses scheduled on Tuesdays starting time from 2:00 to 6:00 PM in the Fall 2023 semester.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by using UC Berkeley Class Search and filtering to Computer Science, Fall 2023, Graduate, and start times 2:00–4:00 PM and 4:00–6:00 PM. The resulting page explicitly showed 13 items, and the visible entries included days/times. From those results, the agent correctly identified the Tuesday-starting graduate COMPSCI sections: COMPSCI C281A (Tu/Th 3:30–4:59), COMPSCI 289A (Tu/Th 2:00–3:29), COMPSCI 294-137 (Tu/Th 2:00–3:29), COMPSCI 294-196 (Tu 4:00–5:59), COMPSCI 294-252 (Tu 2:00–3:59), and COMPSCI 370-001 (Tu 4:00–5:59). These details are directly supported by the page snapshot and the fetched file contents. The final answer matches the evidence.
final_result_response:
I found 6 Fall 2023 graduate-level COMPSCI lecture sections that meet on Tuesday and start between 2:00 and 6:00 PM. Source is UC Berkeley Class Search filtered to Computer Science, Fall 2023, Graduate, and 2-6 PM start-time buckets. <citation refs="fetch_call_55Y6QufOYKxRjERyDA4eQBM3|fc_0616b8b6acc5e63b016a04bec8b4f0819991c248c1eea1c400#1">Berkeley Class Search lists these Fall 2023 COMPSCI graduate sections with their days and times.</citation>

| Course | Title / Topic | Tuesday time | Instructor(s) | Location | Class # |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---:|
| COMPSCI C281A | Statistical Learning Theory | Tu, Th 3:30-4:59 PM | Benjamin Recht | Soda 306 | 32425 |
| COMPSCI 289A | Introduction to Machine Learning | Tu, Th 2:00-3:29 PM | Jennifer Listgarten, Jitendra Malik | Dwinelle 155 | 28195 |
| COMPSCI 294-137 | Special Topics: Immersive Computing and Virtual Reality | Tu, Th 2:00-3:29 PM | Bjoern Hartmann, Allen Y Yang | Soda 310 | 17411 |
| COMPSCI 294-196 | Special Topics on Science and Technology of Decentralization and Decentralized Intelligence | Tu 4:00-5:59 PM | Xiaodong Dawn Song, Matei Zaharia | Physics Building 1 | 32392 |
| COMPSCI 294-252 | Special Topics: Systems and Architectures for Warehouse-Scale Computers in the Era of Domain-Specific Hardware | Tu 2:00-3:59 PM | Krste Asanovic | Soda 320 | 33369 |
| COMPSCI 370-001 | Adaptive Instruction Methods in Computer Science | Tu 4:00-5:59 PM | Christopher Todd Hunn | Wheeler 204 | 28682 |
